prompt: Write 3 cold-tweet posts (under 240 chars each) for openpatent.ai targeting solo inventors, indie hackers, and AI researchers. Each tweet must (a) name a sharp pain, (b) hint at the $10 / 6-layer proof / 10+ jurisdictions USP, (c) end with the URL openpatent.ai and a strong CTA. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {tweets:[3 strings], signature:string}.
